purpose: Safety/compliance framework for dangerous-goods road-shipment readiness. This bundle defines schema, source map, tunnel-code meanings, confidence rules, and validation rules. It does not reproduce the full ADR Table A dangerous-goods list.

sources.name: ADR 2025 Volume I
use: Chapter 3.2 Table A dangerous goods list

sources.name: GOV.UK transporting dangerous goods: ADR tunnel categories
use: Category E high-risk/few dangerous goods allowed concept

sources.name: UPS Dangerous Goods Utility API OpenAPI file uploaded by user
sources.note: Useful for future carrier precheck integration. Not a legal source and not used as the main ADR authority.

copyright_and_safety_note: The full ADR Table A is a copyrighted official publication. This framework avoids reproducing the full table and instead prepares a safe schema/validation layer. Row-level ingestion should be performed inside the user's own project from licensed/official sources or an openly licensed structured dataset.
